top_signals.title: Endless Shrimp Deal Was Scheme to Squeeze Red Lobster, Suit Says
top_signals.summary: Red Lobster’s $20 all-you-can-eat shrimp deal wasn’t just a badly designed promotion that inadvertently helped tip the iconic American restaurant chain into bankruptcy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
